response.justification: Aisha possesses extensive experience in geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) and low-latency, high-throughput backend services (Dunnhumby). Although their recent primary languages are TypeScript and DLang rather than C++ or Rust, their foundational C++ experience, systems-level DLang expertise, and deep domain knowledge in GIS make them a highly promising candidate capable of adapting to this routing tiling role.
strengths: Extensive domain knowledge in geospatial data platforms and mapping (GISCollective).
Proven experience building low-latency, high-throughput backend systems handling millions of requests per second.
Strong systems programming background utilizing DLang and C++ for robust backend solutions.
concerns: Recent professional experience heavily leans toward TypeScript and Node.js rather than the required C++ or Rust.
Professional C++ experience is somewhat dated, primarily from a 2014-2015 role at National Instruments.
Lacks direct mention of specific routing algorithm or navigation guidance experience, focusing more on general GIS mapping.
